3260480.name: Second Sun Demo
3260480.description:
WELCOME TO THE SECOND SUN DEMO, A PASSION PROJECT BY AN INDIE DEV TEAM

In this DEMO you get to experience the first mission in service of the order of the Second Sun. You've been specifically trained for this mission, and this is your final test to make sure you're ready. Do you have what it takes?

Though still lacking the needed experience to fully utilize them, in this DEMO you'll get a first taste of your class abilities, weapons, and, above all, your skills in this Hi-octane FPS RPG. You'll experience a sneak peek of what a fully trained soldier in service of the order is capable of.

Combat is fast-paced and relies on movement. Enemies will claw at you, shoot at you, and chase you. Will you be able to fight your way through them before it is too late?

Kill, loot, and upgrade your gear. In this DEMO the loot-table is available to you. Second Sun has a clear progression system which keeps every kill exciting. Every enemy drop and every chest could contain a crucial item for your first quest. All 3 classes are available to you, and your stat focus is depending on how you want to build your Sunborn.

Specifically for this DEMO:

  • Get a snippet of the vast open-world

  • Get a first taste of the power of a soldier in the order of the Second Sun

  • Fight, loot and upgrade your gear and abilities

  • The demo offers a linear story. Complete this mission and prove you're up to the challenge.

  • Become a member of the empire now!
